_description: Per-stage sim predictions and DIMM-top per-stage RTL TB cycles at single-Q-row scope. Used as alignment targets for Steps 1-5 of the AH cycle alignment work. linear_qkv targets reference the FC arm timing; mac_qk/mac_sv targets reference single-Q-row gemm row timing; softmax_exp/norm targets reference the per-Q-row analytical latency.
scope: single-Q-row stage span (DIMM-top TBs) + FC arm streaming (gemm_pipeline_profile / gemm_dsp)

_aggregation_rules._note: Per-stage targets are PER-Q-ROW. Full-stage time at N=128 scope is computed via the formulas below. Cross-checked against expected_cycles.json ns_breakdown for NL-DPE: linear_qkv=23553, mac_qk=52750, softmax_exp=395, softmax_norm=228, mac_sv=49340 (all ≤1% of the formulas' predictions, modulo first-output initialization).
_aggregation_rules.linear_qkv_full_ns: first_output_ns + (N-1) * steady_ns           (streaming through ping-pong DPE pair / parallel-output DSPs)
_aggregation_rules.mac_qk_full_ns: first_output_ns + (N-1) * per_row_steady_ns   (Layout A + Regime B; first_output ≈ per_row_total)
_aggregation_rules.softmax_exp_full_ns: per_row_total_ns * ceil(N / W)                (W=16 lanes process rows_per_lane=8 rows in parallel)

_step_alignment_targets.Step 1 (mac_qk streaming): RTL stage_span ≈ first_output + (N-1) * steady. Per-Q-row first-output target = sim_per_row_total_ns / t_clk_TB.
_step_alignment_targets.Step 2 (softmax streaming): RTL stage_span (N rows) ≈ per_row_total_ns * ceil(N/W) / t_clk_TB.
_step_alignment_targets.Step 4 (DIMM-top intra-row): Total per-Q-row = max(mac_qk_first, softmax_first, mac_sv_first) instead of sum (pipelined within Q row).
_step_alignment_targets.Step 5 (head outer loop): Full-N E2E = t_fill + (N-1)*t_steady + t_drain ≈ above ns_breakdown sums.

rtl_tb_note: The currently-passing per-stage RTL TBs are the DIMM-top latency TBs (tb_nldpe_dimm_top_latency.v, tb_azurelily_dimm_top_latency.v). These probe one Q-row through the score → softmax → wsum cascade (stage names: score=mac_qk, softmax=softmax_exp+norm folded for AL/separate for NL-DPE, wsum=mac_sv). The legacy stand-alone tb_score / tb_softmax / tb_wsum (tb_dimm_score.v, tb_nldpe_dimm_mac_sv_*.v, etc.) are DEPRECATED — see header banner in those files. linear_qkv has no per-stage TB; the FC primitive is verified separately via tb_fc_*.v.

linear_qkv.rtl_cycles_per_q_row: N/A (no per-stage TB; verified via tb_fc_*.v at FC primitive level)
linear_qkv._source: scheduler.py:_run_linear → imc_core.gemm_pipeline_profile (NL-DPE FC) — first_output_ns=t_fill, steady=max stage. K=d=64, N=d=64, M=N=128 (per-arm streaming).

mac_qk.rtl_source: tb_nldpe_dimm_top_latency.v 'Score stage' (score_inst.state==S_OUTPUT first-out, single-Q-row scope, DIMM-top single-lane probe)
mac_qk._source: fpga_fabric.py:gemm_log row_timing — M=N=128, K=d=64, N=N=128, n_parallel_dpes=W=16, K_id_phys=2 (c=128 dual-identity).

softmax_exp.rtl_cycles_per_q_row: see DIMM-top softmax stage = 27 cycles (includes exp+norm fold in DIMM-top probe)
softmax_exp._source: scheduler.py:_run_softmax_exp NL-DPE branch: imc_core.dimm_nonlinear(N, exp) / W_softmax + ceil(log2(W_softmax)) * t_clk

softmax_norm.rtl_cycles_per_q_row: folded into DIMM-top softmax stage probe = 27 cycles (NL-DPE log-softmax fusion: norm_fpga/W + reduction)
softmax_norm._source: scheduler.py:_run_softmax_norm NL-DPE log-fusion branch: fpga.norm_fpga(N) / W_softmax + ceil(log2(W_softmax)) * t_clk

mac_sv._source: fpga_fabric.py:gemm_log row_timing — M=N=128, K=N=128, N=d=64, n_parallel_dpes=W=16, K_id_phys=1, helper_fires_per_row_per_lane=1 (ws_log helper).

e2e._note: DIMM-top E2E excludes linear_qkv. Full attention head E2E (with FC arms) is tracked separately in expected_cycles.json (advisory only post-Bug-1).

linear_qkv.rtl_cycles_per_q_row: N/A (no per-stage TB; AL FC verified via tb_fc_*.v at primitive level)
linear_qkv._source: scheduler.py:_run_linear AL Baseline branch — fpga.gemm_dsp(M=128, K=64, N=64, n_parallel_outputs=N=64). AL FC has no separate fill/steady decomposition; first_output = total latency, steady = total/M.

mac_qk.rtl_source: tb_azurelily_dimm_top_latency.v 'Score stage' (mac_qk first valid_n, DIMM-top single-lane probe). Note AL DIMM-top measures first-row k_tile_qk only (=16 + 2 SRAM setup).
mac_qk._source: fpga_fabric.py:gemm_dsp row_timing — M=N=128, K=d=64, N=N=128, n_parallel_outputs=W=16, fires_per_lane_per_row=N. DSP_WIDTH=4.

softmax_exp.rtl_cycles_per_q_row: DIMM-top softmax probe folds AL S_LOAD + S_INV + first S_NORM = 2289 cyc (includes 127 sequential rows streaming into S_LOAD)
softmax_exp._source: scheduler.py:_run_softmax_exp AL else-branch — fpga.exp_fpga(N) (per-row, no /W split: AL has W LUT instances running rows_per_lane rows in parallel).

softmax_norm.rtl_cycles_per_q_row: folded into DIMM-top softmax probe 2289 cyc (AL clb_softmax: S_LOAD all rows → S_INV → S_NORM)
softmax_norm._source: scheduler.py:_run_softmax_norm AL else-branch — fpga.norm_fpga(N) (per-row latency, AL: W lanes process rows_per_lane rows in parallel).

mac_sv.rtl_source: tb_azurelily_dimm_top_latency.v 'Wsum stage' (mac_sv first valid_n). AL DIMM-top measures first-row k_tile_sv only (=ceil(N/4)=32).
mac_sv._source: fpga_fabric.py:gemm_dsp row_timing — M=N=128, K=N=128, N=d=64, n_parallel_outputs=W=16, fires_per_lane_per_row=1.

e2e._note: DIMM-top E2E excludes linear_qkv. Includes mac_qk + clb_softmax + mac_sv.

tb_status.tb_nldpe_dimm_top_latency.v: PASS (validated 2026-04-26, RTL=260/27/252/539, sim=248/17/240/505, all Δ within phase3_known_deltas tolerance)
tb_status.tb_azurelily_dimm_top_latency.v: PASS (validated 2026-04-26, RTL=18/2289/32/2340, sim=18/2288/32/2338, all Δ within phase5_known_deltas tolerance)
tb_status.tb_score (legacy): DEPRECATED (tb_dimm_score.v: W=1 4×4 exploration, see file header banner)
tb_status.tb_softmax (legacy): DEPRECATED (no current standalone TB; covered by DIMM-top latency probe)
tb_status.tb_wsum (legacy): DEPRECATED (tb_*_dimm_mac_sv_*.v files marked DEPRECATED in headers)
tb_status._note: The DIMM-top latency TBs (tb_nldpe_dimm_top_latency.v + tb_azurelily_dimm_top_latency.v) supersede the per-stage TBs and drive a single Q-row through all DIMM stages with per-stage timestamps. These are the correct Step-0 anchor for cycle-alignment work.
